markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's fit for scaling Grammarly's content production.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Scale content 3x (from 3-person team) without sacrificing quality, targeting editorial, programmatic, and paid landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Programmatic:** GrowthX confirmed its platform supports the required scale (hundreds-to-thousands of variations), with pricing dependent on who provides the templates and data inputs.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Paid Landing Pages:** This is a viable editorial workstream for GrowthX, as the core need is high-volume copy creation, not web design.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [**Proposal:** A special offer for Grammarly includes 10 editorial pieces/week (double the standard) for $30k/mo, plus a programmatic add-on for $10k/mo (a $5k discount).](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)

## Topics

### Grammarly's Content Scaling Challenge

  - [**Primary Goal:** 3x content output while maintaining brand quality.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Required Content Types:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
      - [Editorial content (guides, comparisons).](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [Programmatic SEO (hundreds-to-thousands of page variations).](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [Paid landing pages (high-volume copy for specific keywords).](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [**Key Concern:** The platform's ability to handle programmatic scale, as Grammarly's use cases are far larger than typical.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Hybrid Model:** Combines AI workflows with human experts (e.g., Matthew Panzerino, former TechCrunch EIC) for strategy, execution, and AEO monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Programmatic Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Pricing Model:** Cost depends on who creates the templates and provides data inputs.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
          - [**GrowthX Creates:** Higher cost.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
          - [**Grammarly Provides:** Lower cost.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Engineering:** GrowthX has forward-deployed engineers for template creation (additional cost), but this is scoped during the 8-week strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Onboarding Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** Defines strategy and publishes \~10 pieces to validate the partnership before the 12-month term begins.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Scope:** Typically covers editorial and one programmatic workstream to avoid overcommitment.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### Proposal & Pricing

  - [**Context:** The proposal is timed with the Superhuman Mail contract renewal in February.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**Special Offer for Grammarly:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [**Editorial:** 10 pieces/week for $30k/mo (double the standard volume).](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
      - [**Programmatic:** Add-on for $10k/mo (a $5k discount).](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Business Model Alignment:** Kelly clarified Grammarly is self-serve, not enterprise. Lake confirmed GrowthX's focus is on content, which aligns with this model.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lake:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
      - [Add Kelly to the PandaDoc proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
      - [Send Superhuman Mail case study and performance data to Jess.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up with the Superhuman Mail team director to detail strategy and workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [**Jess:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
      - [Package all GrowthX materials for Kelly.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [**Grammarly:**](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
      - [Make a final decision before the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/LpwKXFsFEn6ehfpZzmUTgq51Rz7Rxwz7?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
